name: Swing 2 Green
address: 117 N Main St Suite 4, Cynthiana, KY 41031
about: Swing 2 Green is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Cynthiana, Kentucky. It features state-of-the-art Trackman technology allowing for year-round play regardless of weather conditions. The venue offers a mix of membership programs and standard hourly rates, along with opportunities for group events and individual practice sessions. Swing 2 Green caters to golfers of all skill levels, providing a space for serious practice, social outings, and improvement through technology and lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf access with advanced Trackman simulator technology
Flexible membership options for regular players
Available for hosting group events and corporate outings
Provides a relaxed environment for both practice and social play

food_and_drink.notes: Selection of food and drinks available
Cold beer listed as coming soon

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify if club rentals are available or if customers must bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue provides a selection of food and drinks, with cold beer coming soon. Outside food and drink policies aren't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required to complete 18 holes on their simulators.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't explicitly mention kid-friendly policies or junior programs on their website.
